# globalNex

> globalNex helps manufacturers save money on metal spend with custom analysis of raw materials and composition—so you can negotiate pricing and hedge increases before the next surcharge hits.

Example: a supplier demands +12% on 6061-T6; we decompose the grade, show true cost at +4.2%, and deliver a counter at 5%—plus timing to lock before indices climb again.

## What you get

- Composition analysis of invoices and BOMs (grade → metals by weight)
- Defensible negotiation counters when suppliers ask for more than the metals warrant
- Line-by-line surcharge rejection reports before AP pays
- Hedge timing when indices move on the grades you buy

## How it works

1. **Analyze composition** — map invoices/BOMs to alloy chemistry
2. **Negotiate pricing** — justified cost delta and counters
3. **Hedge increases** — early signal to lock, hedge, or dual-source

## Key pages

- [Home](https://glblnex.com/): Offer, example, FAQ
- [Send an invoice](https://glblnex.com/started): Start with a supplier invoice

## Who it is for

Procurement and supply-chain teams in defense, aerospace, automotive, industrial manufacturing, hardware, and medical devices where metal spend is material.
